Bozeman, Montana

Northeast Neighborhood

"Last Best Neighborhood"

A vibrant, historic community in the heart of Bozeman. Neighbors connecting, collaborating, and celebrating everything that makes our corner of Montana special.

Upcoming Events About NENA

Our Mission

"To preserve and enhance the quality of life in the Northeast Neighborhood through community engagement, advocacy, and connection."

40+ Years of Community
500+ Households
4 Active Committees

10

Spring Neighborhood Cleanup

📍 Beall Park
